question: How did you implement advisor client list dashboard on the Summit Capital Advisors engagement?
answer: We implemented advisor client list dashboard on the Summit Capital Advisors engagement by extending patterns already proven in @iqtech/ui-core. That consistency helped us resolve most production UI defects within one business day.
